description.txt: Solo founder using Soleur as their AI organization
Claude LLM for agent reasoning and tool use
Source control, CI/CD, issue tracking, and releases
DNS, CDN, R2 storage, and zero-trust tunnel

Hosting, data, and zero-trust access
